title: [video babbel enhanced]
description: Language learning platform that ingests any video the user knows in their native language, transcribes it (Whisper), translates every line (LLM), scores each segment by frequency-vocabulary coverage and drillability using SUBTLEX word lists, and extracts the top N pedagogically valuable clips. Outputs a full dual-language video plus a spaced-repetition drill deck of short clips. Practice modes: full watch, phrase drill, listening comprehension, shadowing. Optional lip sync via video_langfake.
